projectDescription: A conversation-first, image-first PPT workflow skill for AI coding assistants (Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode) that guides users from a vague deck request through content research, real visual previews, style refinement, and final image-rendered PPTX delivery.
keyFeatures: Conversation-first intake that avoids long questionnaires
Pre-style content research stage that produces a content_report.md as grounding material
Real image-based style preview generation (not text mockups or wireframes)
Multi-direction style proposal with 首页/目录页/正文页 (cover/TOC/body) previews for each direction
Iterative style refinement rounds before locking direction
Style inversion confirmation to extract stable visual facts from chosen previews
Deck-level continuity anchor ensuring visual consistency across all slides
Multi-candidate final generation with bundled candidate-picker HTML shell
Structured review-and-retouch loop via bundled review HTML shell
Image-first final output: GPT Image 2 renders full slide pages packaged into PPTX
publicApiSurface: SKILL.md — skill entry point and working principles for Codex/Claude Code/OpenCode
references/workflow.md — stage-by-stage process with 3 confirmation points
references/style-system.md — V1-V8 style vectors and proposal rules
references/preview-flow.md — preview generation and shell usage rules
assets/preview_shell/index.html — bundled style preview UI shell
assets/candidate_picker_shell/index.html — bundled candidate selection UI shell
